[[R2-F7]] was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]], and part of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He was assigned to the rebel outpost, [[Karinda Outpost]], on the planet [[Karinda]]. While there, he was assigned as the pilot of their [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]], as the base was very undermanned. Even though they came under attack, he managed to get a group of rebels who had arrived on the planet with much needed supplies to the base without any major damage to the skiff.
